description: Creates a line parallel to an existing line through a given point.
utility: Create a parallel line through a point

arguments.name: line
arguments.description: Existing line to be parallel to

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: Point the parallel line passes through

alternates.description: Line parallel to existing line through given point

examples.scenario: Line parallel to L through point P
Parallel reference line through circle center for secant-circle tangency analysis
